app.name: Pantry Rescue Queue
app.tagline: Rescue what is about to go bad before you buy more.

target_user.primary: Solo household food operator who does one weekly grocery trip, has fridge/freezer/pantry overflow, and repeatedly discovers expiring food or duplicate buys while deciding dinner.
context: notices an item about to go bad
does not want complete inventory setup before value
target_user.evidence_caveat: RAW-BEACHHEAD-GAP-010 preserves that solo-household is a sharp synthesis, not externally proven optimal segment.

activation.promise: One manually quick-added item creates a useful rescue queue decision in under 30 seconds without inventory setup, account, scanner, OCR, sync, or payment.
first_use_flow: choose urgency tonight/1-2 days/this week/not sure
see ranked rescue lane entry and primary rescue action
activation.first_useful_result_definition: The app recommends what to do with the item now, not merely that the item exists in inventory.

trigger: local expiry/urgency reminder in a later proof
opening the app because something in the fridge is yelling
reward_progress: duplicate-buy caution becomes available before next grocery trip

screens.name: Rescue Mouth / First Use
screens.description: One-line item entry with location chips and urgency rail; no dashboard/table/scanner-first flow.

screens.name: Rescue Lane
screens.description: Ranked at-risk items with immediate rescue verbs and visible action state transition.

screens.name: Quiet Fridge Progress
screens.description: Queue shrink and weekly rescue progress as relief-oriented copy, not abstract metric cards.

screens.name: Caution Memory
screens.description: Do-not-buy-again warning created from rescue/ignore action and surfaced later.

screens.name: Weekly Rescue Recap
screens.description: Returning-user surface referencing prior action and suggesting a next rescue action.

screens.name: Local Settings / Trust Note
screens.description: Minimal local-only trust copy; must not introduce account/sync/paywall scope.

fields.name: user-entered food name
fields.status: queued | planned | rescued | frozen | ignored | too_late

local_persistence_requirement.purpose: Prove returning value is not placeholder prose.
minimum_behaviors: at least one RescueItem survives relaunch or simulated returning session
at least one RescueAction updates queue/progress state
at least one CautionMemory is created from an action and later surfaced
WeeklyRecap or equivalent derived recap references prior action state
allowed_later: mock manager chosen by native implementation worker

acceptance_criteria: activation under 30 seconds from prompt to useful rescue decision
manual quick-add produces decision/action, not just database row
core loop action changes queue/progress state
returning session shows prior rescue/caution/progress state
duplicate caution is created from rescue action and surfaces later
weekly recap references prior actions and suggests next action
monetization remains no_monetization_yet with no paywall/StoreKit/payment surface
first useful surface is Rescue Mouth + Rescue Lane, not dashboard cards or inventory tables
evidence ties screenshots/video/tests to coverage matrix IDs

coverage_matrix.required_proof_surface: Rescue Mouth -> Rescue Lane first-use path under 30s
Weekly recap and next action after prior rescue
coverage_matrix.failure_mode: No visible difference between first and later session

coverage_matrix.later_native_proof_required: local persistence proof after relaunch or simulated return

coverage_matrix.required_proof_surface: Caution created from rescue action and surfaced later
coverage_matrix.failure_mode: Caution is a static settings/list feature

coverage_matrix.required_proof_surface: Quiet progress path + weekly recap with next action

coverage_matrix.later_native_proof_required: evidence that no paywall/IAP/payment path appears

future_local_pro_boundary_candidates_not: export/share draft of rescue list as local text/CSV

non_goals: native app repo generation in this task
success_gates: activation.first_use has simulator evidence and reaches a useful rescue action
persistence.returning_state has evidence after relaunch or equivalent returning-state simulation
retention.weekly_recap references prior actions and produces a next action
memory.duplicate_caution has creation and later-surfacing evidence
money.deferred_boundary is preserved with no live monetization surface
app-specific UI would fail if pantry/rescue/caution concepts were token-swapped away
skeptical reviewer cannot fairly call result a generic dashboard/card/list scaffold
failure_gates: generic dashboard/metric cards/inventory table/tab scaffold before first useful rescue action
activation requires quantity, price, purchase date, account, complete inventory, barcode, OCR, receipt, sync, family setup, or payment
manual add creates only a row/list item
action buttons do not visibly update queue/progress
returning session lacks prior action/caution/recap state
duplicate caution is static rather than action-created
weekly recap has no next action
monetization copy claims Pro/subscription/premium/trial/price or hides core value behind paid boundary
barcode/OCR/sync/import/payment is introduced as required MVP scope
evidence cannot be audited from screenshots/video/tests/coverage artifacts
